parameters.query: SELECT item_id, name, base_price_cents, sell_price_cents, active FROM menu_items WHERE item_id = ANY(ARRAY[{{ $json.lookup_item_ids.map(id => "'" + id.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'").join(",") }}]::varchar[]);
SELECT mod_id, group_id, mod_name, price_delta_cents, active FROM modifiers WHERE mod_id = ANY(ARRAY[{{ $json.lookup_mod_ids.map(id => "'" + id.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'").join(",") }}]::varchar[]);

SELECT group_id, item_id, min_select, max_select, group_type, group_label FROM modifier_groups WHERE group_id = ANY(ARRAY[{{ $json.lookup_group_ids.map(id => "'" + id.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'").join(",") }}]::varchar[]);
